Project Nyx is a Unified Ring-0 WebAssembly Composable Unikernel. It embeds a Wasm VM directly inside the Linux kernel, using eBPF TCX for zero-copy network steering and LSM hooks for zero-trust security. By bypassing Ring-3 context switches, it achieves blazing-fast, bare-metal microservice execution within a mathematically secure sandbox.
